name: @tootallnate/dsp-adpcm
description: Pure-JS decoder for Nintendo DSP-ADPCM (also called GC ADPCM), the 4-bit lossy audio codec used in Nintendo's audio formats from the GameCube onward (BFWAV, BFSTM, BFSTP, BWAV, BCWAV, BRSTM, …). Produces interleaved s16 PCM ready to wrap in a WAV file or feed to the Web Audio API.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
